items.claim: O'Flaherty has a 1-14 record shooting takedowns in the UFC.
items.quote: 1-14 so far in the UFC shooting takedowns

items.claim: Reyes possesses high-level submission skills, specifically chokes.
items.quote: Reyes has some nasty chokes, too, right?

items.claim: Ruziboev has not competed in a professional fight since his scheduled bout against Bryan Battle was cancelled in August.
items.quote: Roosmalen has not been booked in a fight since now of course this Saturday against Pulaev.

items.claim: Ruziboev holds a professional record of 4-1 in the UFC.
Ruziboev's previous victories over Eric McConico and Dustin Stoltzfus were not against high-level competition.
items.quote: Yes, his wins aren't the highest level.
